findings.title: Shell injection in rebuild-search-local.ts
findings.issue: execSync with string interpolation allows shell injection via KV key values
findings.suggestion: Use execFileSync with argument array instead of execSync with string interpolation
findings.resolution: FIXED - switched to execFileSync with argument array, made KV_NAMESPACE_ID configurable via env var

findings.title: Stale comment in search.ts describing old shard strategy
findings.issue: Comment describes old single-char shard strategy; misleading after multi-token indexing
findings.suggestion: Update comment to reflect multi-token shard indexing
findings.resolution: FIXED - comment updated to describe current multi-token indexing strategy

findings.title: Unused getShardKey import in rebuild-search route
findings.issue: getShardKey imported but never used (only getNameShardKeys and getAuthorShardKey are used)

findings.title: getNameShardKeys returns empty array for separator-only names
findings.issue: Names like '---' produce no tokens, returning empty array which skips indexing entirely
findings.suggestion: Add fallback to '_' shard when no tokens are produced
findings.resolution: FIXED - added fallback to '_' shard for empty token sets
